contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: A3: dapp prod/beta fork split — dapp_prod (fork of dapp_beta) serves dapp.truesight.me
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/53
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/225
  
  Details:
  Executed A3 as a true fork + domain migration (operator chose this over a plain rename). Verified content parity (dapp_beta = dapp HEAD + CNAME commit), forked dapp_beta -> TrueSightDAO/dapp_prod (fork=true), pointed dapp_prod CNAME at dapp.truesight.me, released the domain from old dapp (deleted its Pages), enabled Pages on dapp_prod -> dapp.truesight.me now serves HTTP 200 from the fork with no downtime. Archived old dapp (read-only, superseded). Pointed autopilot allowlists at dapp_prod (truesight_autopilot#53, deployed). Updated canonical docs WORKSPACE_CONTEXT §6/§7 + PROJECT_INDEX + roadmap tracker (agentic_ai_context#225). Structure now matches the org convention: prod is a fork of the non-fork beta base (like truesight_me_prod/agroverse_shop_prod).
  
  PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/53 , https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/225
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
